goal: Clarify prompt role hierarchy text in `internal/provider/protocol.go` for leader, worker, planner, and evaluator prompts, then verify with Go build and tests.
summary: Verify Update the role-introduction text in `internal/provider/protocol.go` so each orchestration role has explicit hierarchy and responsibility boundaries: leader operates under an orchestrator supervisor and coordinates workers without implementing, worker executes implementation tasks and reports files/commands/errors, and planner/evaluator receive parallel hierarchy-oriented descriptions consistent with the system design. After editing, review any related documentation references that should stay aligned with prompt semantics, then run `go build ./...` and `go test ./...` to confirm the prompt text change does not break compilation or existing behavior. with required steps: implement
tester_instructions: Read the verification contract before running tests.
Use the contract to choose only the tests needed for the current step.
Return the exact commands, outcomes, and artifacts produced.
evaluator_criteria: tester output references the verification contract
tester output includes concrete artifacts or logs
required step coverage matches the sprint contract
